case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. VICTOR NOE GALDAMEZ SANCHEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED MAR-18-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, VICTOR NOE GALDAMEZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, VICTOR NOE GALDAMEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, VICTOR NOE GALDAMEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-23-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT VICTOR NOE GALDAMEZ SANCHEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTOR NOE GALDAMEZ SANCHEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
